person.name: Harding FitzEadnoth
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Harding of Bristol (born circa 1048, died circa 1125) was sheriff reeve of Bristol, with responsibility for managing a manorial estate and perhaps similar duties to those of a magistrate. He was the son of Eadnoth the Constable, an Anglo-Saxon thane who served as steward to Edward the Confessor and Harold II. He was the father of Robert Fitzharding who became lord of Berkeley, Gloucestershire.

His wife Livida supposedly died at the manor of Whetonhurst, Blacklow Hundred, Gloucestershire, England in 1101.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Harding FitzEadnoth於1060年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Eadnoth the Constable26歲，母親Rissa de Dursley26歲。他於1089年與Livida De Meriet在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1125年11月6日在英國英格蘭布里斯托享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a medieval English given name. The Old English form was Hearding, a derivative (originally patronymic in form) of Heard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, a byname or short form of the various compound personal names containing this element. Use as a given name may have been influenced by the U.S. president Warren Gamaliel Harding ( 1865–1923 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Harding FitzEadnoth was born in 1060, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Eadnoth the Constable, was 26 and his mother, Rissa de Dursley, was 26. He married Livida De Meriet in 1089, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 November 1125, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Harding FitzEadnoth est né en 1060, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eadnoth the Constable, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Rissa de Dursley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Livida De Meriet en 1089, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1125, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Harding FitzEadnoth 1060 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eadnoth the Constable 26 und seine Mutter Rissa de Dursley 26. Er hat 1089 in Bristol, England, United Kingdom Livida De Meriet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1125 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Harding FitzEadnoth è nato il nel 1060 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eadnoth the Constable, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Rissa de Dursley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Livida De Meriet nel 1089, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1125, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Harding FitzEadnothが1060年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Eadnoth the Constableは26歳，母Rissa de Dursleyは26歳であった。1089年にイギリスイギリスブリストルでLivida De Merietと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1125年11月6日にイギリスイギリスブリストルで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Harding FitzEadnoth(이)가 1060년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eadnoth the Constable(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Rissa de Dursley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 Livida De Meriet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 11월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Harding FitzEadnoth nasceu em 1060, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eadnoth the Constable, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Rissa de Dursley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Livida De Meriet em 1089, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1125, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Harding FitzEadnoth родился в 1060 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eadnoth the Constable было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Rissa de Dursley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Livida De Meriet в 1089 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1125 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Harding FitzEadnoth nació en 1060, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Eadnoth the Constable, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Rissa de Dursley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Livida De Meriet en 1089, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1125, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
